title: calorophus pubescens
intro: Calorophus pubescens, also known as the Purple Sage, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Calorophus pubescens include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, sore throats, and digestive problems.
